## How to test

- [ ] `docker build .`
- [ ] `helm lint chart/`
- [ ] `helm template test chart/`
- [ ] Tested manually

## Commit type

<!-- Which applies? This determines the version bump on merge to main -->

- [ ] `fix:` - patch bump
- [ ] `feat:` - minor bump
- [ ] `feat!:` or breaking change - major bump
- [ ] `chore:` / `docs:` / `refactor:` - patch bump
